# Reporting Security Issues

The gower-metric developers take security issues seriously. If you discover a potential security vulnerability in the gower-metric codebase, please follow the steps below to report it responsibly.

## Reporting a Security Vulnerability

To protect users of gower-metric, please do not disclose the vulnerability publicly until it has been addressed. In order to address it more effectively, please use `Security` tab to report the issue.

## Long-Term Fix Strategy

Once a security vulnerability is reported, the gower-metric team will investigate the issue and work on a fix. The team will prioritize security fixes and aim to release a patch as soon as possible. Users are encouraged to update to the latest version of gower-metric once a fix is released.

## Preferences

- We prefer to receive security reports via the `Security` tab on GitHub
- Please report one issue at a time to help us address each vulnerability effectively
- We appreciate detailed information about the vulnerability, including steps to reproduce it if possible
